hero.kicker: Personal Life & Wellness · Ansiversa mini app
hero.title: Fitness Tracker
hero.description: Create activities, log completed sessions, and review activity history in a practical non-clinical workspace.

differences.title: Keep activity records and completed sessions connected
differences.description: Fitness Tracker focuses on manual activity logging and review without medical claims, calorie promises, wearable sync, or AI coaching.

items.title: Activity records
items.description: Create editable activities with type, default duration, intensity, status, and notes.

items.title: Session logs
items.description: Record completed sessions with date, duration, intensity, effort, optional distance, and notes.

items.title: Review signals
items.description: Review total minutes, weekly minutes, recent logs, and activity mix.

feel.title: A clear record of completed movement
feel.description: The workflow keeps activity setup, session logging, and review close together without turning tracking into coaching.

items.title: Create an activity
items.description: Name the activity and set practical defaults.

items.title: Log a session
items.description: Record what was completed after it happens.

items.title: Review activity
items.description: Use summaries to understand recent movement history.

audiences.title: Who uses Fitness Tracker
audiences.description: Fitness Tracker is useful for people who want a simple personal activity record inside Ansiversa.

items.title: Everyday movers
items.description: Record walks, gym sessions, mobility, sports, or other activities.

items.title: Manual trackers
items.description: Keep fitness activity visible without depending on a wearable.

items.title: Ansiversa users
items.description: Use a focused wellness workflow beside goals, meals, and other everyday tools.

resourceSection.title: Fitness-tracking essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep activities, logs, and review summaries connected.

groupedSection.title: Log activity without pressure
groupedSection.description: Use one protected workflow for practical personal activity records.

items.name: Activity
items.description: Set type, intensity, default duration, status, and notes.

items.name: Log
items.description: Record completed sessions with practical details.

items.name: Totals
items.description: See total and weekly logged minutes.

items.name: Recent logs
items.description: Review sessions without calorie or health promises.

technicalSection.title: Built for owner-scoped activity logging
technicalSection.description: Fitness Tracker follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: Protected activities, logs, and insights workflow.

finalCta.title: Ready to log activity?
finalCta.description: Open Fitness Tracker and create the first activity record.
